validation_commands: make -C . check (top-level: builds all + runs SSWTests, TacticalTests, GuiTests under xvfb-run)
validation_outcome: src/strategic builds clean with no new warnings. Top-level `make check` from the worktree root completed with exit code 0 (the check target stops and propagates a non-zero exit at the first failing suite, so exit 0 confirms all three passed): SSWTests, TacticalTests, and GuiTests (OK, 85 tests) all green. The first make check run surfaced one source-inspection failure, FGameHeaderDependencyTest::testSourceDoesNotUseDisplayPaintingHelpers, because the initial FGame.cpp comment contained the literal token 'WXPlayerDisplay' (that test forbids WXMapDisplay/WXPlayerDisplay/WXGameDisplay tokens in FGame.cpp); the comment was reworded to 'gui fleet-draw path' with no gui class token and the second run is fully green, with no production behavior affected. No behavioral test was authored by this run; behavioral coverage (out-of-range location ID, out-of-range jump-route ID, valid-sentinel positive control) is the Tester's responsibility in tests/strategic/FGameSaveFormatTest.{h,cpp}.
